since_last: 50% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +3.96%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 50% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.28% · BTC +0.72% · Gold +1.28% · Nasdaq100 +0.27%. 50% of 84 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +3.96%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +3.96%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -1.88%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at +6.62%
cards.body: Leaders: TER +6.62%, AMAT +6.18%, MU +6.17%, MRVL +6.16%, KLAC +5.81%. Laggards: IBM -4.67%, CRM -4.56%, NOW -4.09%, META -3.75%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.62% at $150.71
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.62% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
